---
name: Question
about: Ask how something is meant to work
title: "[question] "
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## What you're trying to do

The bigger goal, not just the immediate question.

## What you've tried

Commands you ran, docs you read, code you looked at.

## Where you got stuck

The specific moment things stopped making sense.

## What would help

A documentation patch? A new example? A clarification in the README?
